Package ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.caching

Class CachingUserData

java.lang.Object
ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.caching.CachingData
ru.tehkode.permissions.backends.caching.CachingUserData
All Implemented Interfaces:
PermissionsData, PermissionsUserData
public class CachingUserData extends CachingData implements PermissionsUserData
User data using a cache.

    • setIdentifier

      public boolean setIdentifier(String identifier)
      Description copied from interface: PermissionsUserData
      Sets the identifier of the user If a user already exists with this identifier, nothing will happen. Only supported for users because of simpler inheritance structure
      Specified by:
      setIdentifier in interface PermissionsUserData
      Parameters:
      identifier - New identifier
      Returns:
      Whether operation was successful
